topStories.description: While the relationship was once thorny enough that Musk challenged Zuckerberg to a cagefight, things seem to have warmed up by the early days of the second Trump administration.

topStories.title: Iran-Backed Houthis Join War as More US Troops Reach Region
topStories.description: Houthi militants launched ballistic missiles at Israel on Saturday morning, marking their entry into the month-long Iran war that has already caused chaos in energy markets and killed thousands of people.

topStories.title: effigy spotted on Washington streets as thousands across NYC, Boston join ‘No Kings’ protest - Watch
topStories.description: Social media was abuzz with netizens posting visuals of the marches. One video showed protesters in Washington D.C. carrying what looked like an inflatable effigy of Donald Trump and a hand-made drawing of US constitution

dailyNews.title: ‘War is going to go on longer than…’: Ex- Trump adviser's ominous warning as Houthis join US-Iran conflict
dailyNews.description: Former Trump Iran adviser Nate Swanson warns the US-Iran war could last longer than expected as Houthis join the conflict, escalating risks to global oil supply and regional stability.

dailyNews.title: Trump is waging war based on instinct and it isn't working
dailyNews.description: One month into the conflict in Iran, Trump's gut-instinct approach is not proving effective.

dailyNews.title: Iran war live: Houthis attack Israel, anti-war protesters rally in Tel Aviv
dailyNews.description: US and Israeli attacks kill a family of four in Bushehr province and damage a water facility in Khuzestan province.

dailyNews.title: Dowry deaths driven by greed, must be dealt with strongly: SC
dailyNews.description: Dowry deaths are a “severe blot on society” and a grave violation of human dignity, the Supreme Court has emphasised, urging courts across the country to deal with such “greed-driven” crimes with an iron hand

dailyNews.title: Vice President JD Vance tops CPAC’s straw poll to be US president in 2028
dailyNews.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio, however, made advances in this year's informal poll about who might succeed Trump.

dailyNews.title: Key moments in first month of US-Israeli war on Iran
dailyNews.description: One month after US and Israel launched strikes on Iran, the conflict has escalated across the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Foiled BofA Bombing in Paris Linked to Mideast War, France Says
dailyNews.description: French anti-terrorism authorities are investigating a foiled bombing near the Bank of America Corp. headquarters in Paris that they said appeared to be linked to the Middle East conflict.

dailyNews.title: Air strikes in Iraq kill three PMF fighters, two police
dailyNews.description: Iraq turning into 'expanding battleground' in war, which began on February 28 with US-Israeli strikes on Iran.

dailyNews.title: What did the Supreme Court rule on Scheduled Castes and religion?
dailyNews.description: What did the Supreme Court say about Scheduled Caste status for those not belonging to Hinduism, Sikhism, or Buddhism? Can SC status be restored through reconversion? What is the Centre’s position on SC status for Dalit Muslims and Christians? What about Scheduled Tribes?

dailyNews.title: No Kings protests across the US rally against Donald Trump
dailyNews.description: The demonstrations against the Trump administration are set to sweep cities across the US on Saturday.

dailyNews.title: "Kissing My A**": Trump Takes A Jibe, Then Praises Saudi Crown Prince
dailyNews.description: Speaking at a Saudi-backed investment forum in Florida, Donald Trump said that the Saudi Crown Prince did not expect the US to make a strong comeback under his presidency.

dailyNews.title: Photos: ‘No Kings’ protests erupt across the US, with a Minnesota focus
dailyNews.description: Saturday's rallies mark the third round of 'No Kings' protests since President Trump took office for a second term.

dailyNews.title: As war rages, Iranian politicians push for exit from nuclear weapons treaty
dailyNews.description: While US-Israeli attacks hit key infrastructure, hardliners demand withdrawal from Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty.

dailyNews.title: France opens probe into suspected attack on Bank of America in Paris
dailyNews.description: Police arrest suspect before setting off explosive device outside US bank's headquarters.

dailyNews.title: Thousands Of Marines Add To Largest US Buildup In Middle East In 20 Years
dailyNews.description: Photos posted by CENTCOM show soldiers in combat fatigues wearing helmets and goggles. The Marines supplement the 50,000 US troops already stationed in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: US Going To Be Out Of Iran 'Soon', Fuel Prices Will Come Down: VP JD Vance
dailyNews.description: JD Vance said the administration intends to keep up the campaign for 'a little while longer' to ensure the US does not have to repeat the operation later

dailyNews.title: US plans to raise minimum salary requirement for H-1B visa holders: How does it affect Indians?
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has proposed a rule increasing costs for hiring H1-B visa holders and raising wage thresholds for employment-based immigration. This may limit opportunities for entry-level foreign workers, especially affecting Indian applicants.

dailyNews.title: France: Paris police detain man while trying to detonate explosive device near Bank of America
dailyNews.description: The national counter-terrorism prosecution department has initiated a formal inquiry into the matter, French Interior Minister Laurent Nunez said

dailyNews.title: Stephen A Smith says there is 'no excuse' for 'biological men' competing in women's sports
dailyNews.description: While voicing support for women's sports, commentator Stephen A. Smith suggested transgender women competing in female sports harms biological females.

dailyNews.title: Jane Fonda warns America faces 'existential' crisis as she urges turnout at 'No Kings' protests
dailyNews.description: Jane Fonda urges Americans to join the "No Kings" protests, suggesting they bring five new people and warning the country faces "existential" threats under Trump.

dailyNews.title: Wild Ultimatums and ‘Bombing Our Little Hearts Out’: A Portrait of Trump at War
dailyNews.description: President Trump has vacillated between boasting about U.S. military superiority and deep frustration that his war of choice is not always having the desired effects.

dailyNews.title: ‘No Kings’ Protests Decry Trump and His Agenda
dailyNews.description: Thousands of organized demonstrations stretched across the country. Minnesota was a focal point of the protests after a tumultuous immigration crackdown.

dailyNews.title: No Kings Protests Held Across the U.S.: Photos and Videos
dailyNews.description: It’s the third time that the coalition behind the “No Kings” movement has organized events to protest President Trump and his policies. In the United States, more than 3,000 demonstrations were planned.

dailyNews.title: F.B.I. Said to Dig Up Old Investigative Files on Democratic Lawmaker
dailyNews.description: The urgent instructions at the Trump administration’s behest to gather and relay the files on Representative Eric Swalwell have alarmed some career law enforcement officials.

dailyNews.title: Clean Energy Companies Are Trying to Survive the Trump Era
dailyNews.description: Offshore wind is out. Geothermal power is in. And many climate technology start-ups are looking for ways to carry on without federal backing.

dailyNews.title: Is Iran a Political Problem for Trump? Tell Me How Long the War Lasts.
dailyNews.description: Historically, quagmire abroad and high prices at home are the ingredients of a failed presidency.

dailyNews.title: Houthis enter Iran war, more U.S. troops arrive to Middle East
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is awaiting Iran's formal response to its 15-point peace proposal, as Tehran continues blocking the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Millions turn out for "No Kings" rallies held worldwide to protest against Trump
dailyNews.description: Organizers estimated that at least 8 million people took part in more than 3,300 "No Kings" events worldwide.

dailyNews.title: Third round of "No Kings" protests held worldwide
dailyNews.description: Protesters across the U.S. and the world took to the streets as part of the latest "No Kings" rallies against President Trump and his administration. Among the biggest was in St. Paul, Minnesota. Cristian Benavides reports.

dailyNews.title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
dailyNews.description: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

dailyNews.title: Thousands of ‘No Kings’ protests against the Trump agenda
dailyNews.description: Thousands of demonstrations are planned in all 50 states in the third round of ‘No Kings’ protests since President Trump took office last year. Organizers for the protests are predicting it will be the “single largest non-violent day of action” in American history. NBC News’ Steven Romo reports.
